transcription.text: When pain wears you down, Icy Hot Dry Spray delivers. Feel it working instantly, providing powerful relief to muscles and joints. Icy Hot. And Icy Hot now has a bold new look, with the same powerful relief to help you rise from pain.

segments.text: When pain wears you down, Icy Hot Dry Spray delivers.
Feel it working instantly, providing powerful relief to muscles and joints.
And Icy Hot now has a bold new look, with the same powerful relief to help you rise from pain.

metadata.title: 2020 Icy Hot Dry Spray When Pain Wears You Down featuring Shaquille O'Neal
